data.body:
kno doctor says:

skills_claude:  ✓ Claude managed skills installed at /Users/cartine/.claude/skills

this is wrong.  that is the User level claude skills

knots should never look there for
kno skills install/uninstall/update
kno doctor
kno doctor --fix

or any other kno subcommand.  knots should never ever under any circumstance look at the user level claude settings.  ever.

Find eveyr such reference and remove it.

instead - knots should look at the PROJECT level claude settings -> ./.claude/skills
data.title: kno doctor looks in wrong place for knots skills for claude
